prompt: 我们已经有 PRD 文件 D:\sun-skills\prd-to-tech-design-review-workspace\fixtures\crm\specs\lead-import\prd.md。请创建前端和后端两个子代理，让他们基于 PRD 协同交流，然后生成并保存 technical-design.md。
assertions: Output includes a saved technical-design.md artifact.
Design maps major PRD requirements including upload, validation preview, duplicate detection, background import, and import history.
Design includes explicit frontend and backend collaboration record or reviewer summaries.
Design includes API contract, data model, status lifecycle, error handling, and testing strategy.
Output is a technical design, not primarily a task list.
